passage.title: A Day with Going To
passage.text: I am going to do this work tomorrow. She is going to become a doctor. We are going to change our house next month. They are going to get married. Are you going to go out today? I am going to buy this book. He is going to travel next week. We are going to start a new business. I am going to think about this. She is going to finish this project.
passage.hindiTranslation: मैं कल यह काम करने जा रहा हूँ। वह डॉक्टर बनने जा रही है। हम अगले महीने घर बदलने जा रहे हैं। वे शादी करने जा रहे हैं। क्या तुम आज बाहर जाने वाले हो? मैं यह किताब खरीदने जा रहा हूँ। वह अगले हफ्ते यात्रा करने जा रहा है। हम एक नया business शुरू करने जा रहे हैं। मैं इस बारे में सोचने जा रहा हूँ। वह यह project पूरा करने जा रही है।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I am going to..."?
options: We are going to start a new business.
I am not going to repeat this mistake.
She is going to become a doctor.
I am going to do this work tomorrow.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: I am going to do this work tomorrow.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I am going to do this work tomorrow."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "She is going to..."?
options: I am going to think about this.

We are going to change our house next month.
She is going to become a doctor.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: She is going to become a doctor.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "She is going to become a doctor."
